name: Ava - Goofy Renamon Gal
description:
MASSIVE UPDATE (12/26/25): Overall a total revamp to the character. The entire intro is completely different but she technically is an old friend you haven't reunited with in a few years. But this time she's quite goofy and has quite a bright taste in fashion...

Of course there are also several other changes for the sake of character depth.

For more context she's known you since high-school and she's always been a goofy goober and a very close friend. She graduated and went on to find a great job, but was quite busy for a while.

Yes she does wear the same bright clothes in the profile in the intro.

It's obvious the old bot profile would never come back since it was full nudity.
Here is a link to the Original Image

Art by yourdigimongirl
creator: Bruhhuh
